title: Small bug fix with obvious root cause
prompt: The CLI crashes when the config file is missing. Fix it so the command reports a clear error and exits non-zero.
expected_artifacts: debug report or concise root-cause summary
review findings or clean review summary
pass_criteria: Routes to /taku-debug before proposing a fix.
Identifies the missing-file path as the root cause, not a generic exception handling problem.
Adds a failing regression test before implementation, or explicitly notes why the repo lacks a test harness and uses a one-off reproduction.
Does not create DESIGN.md for this bounded bugfix.
observed_failure_mode: Not yet run; record actual routing, missed checks, or artifact drift after the first manual evaluation.

title: Ambiguous feature requiring thinking before planning
prompt: Add team notifications so people know when something important happens.
expected_artifacts: scope and architecture review notes in DESIGN.md
pass_criteria: Routes to /taku-think Design mode rather than writing code immediately.
Asks at most two clarifying questions before presenting a conservative executable design.
Keeps review artifacts in DESIGN.md and keeps PLAN.md execution-only.
Defines concrete notification events, delivery rules, and verification criteria before build.
observed_failure_mode: Not yet run; watch for over-broad scope expansion or vague notification semantics.

title: Scoped feature that should produce a compact plan
prompt: Add a --json flag to the existing status command. It should print the same status fields as JSON and keep the current text output as default.
expected_artifacts: mini design or lightweight DESIGN.md section
pass_criteria: Uses Quick mode or a lightweight design instead of full heavy design ceremony.
PLAN.md has one or two concrete tasks with exact files and TDD anchors.
Preserves existing default text behavior in the spec and tests.
Does not introduce unrelated CLI restructuring.
observed_failure_mode: Not yet run; watch for unnecessary architecture work or missing backward-compatibility tests.

title: Build fallback when subagents are unavailable
prompt: Implement the approved PLAN.md. This host has no subagent dispatch capability.
pass_criteria: Keeps the plan's wave grouping visible.
States: Subagents unavailable; using sequential wave execution.
Runs waves locally in dependency order instead of asking the user to choose a mode.
Preserves TDD, reconciliation, review, and verification discipline.
observed_failure_mode: Not yet run; watch for blocking on missing subagents or flattening waves into an opaque task list.

title: Code review request with no diff
prompt: Review my current branch before I merge.
pass_criteria: Detects the base branch and checks for a diff.
Stops cleanly if on the base branch or if the branch has no diff.
Does not invent findings without changed code.
Does not create or modify files.
observed_failure_mode: Not yet run; watch for hallucinated review comments when no diff exists.

title: Code review request with known critical issue
prompt: Review this diff. It adds a search endpoint that builds a SQL WHERE clause from a query parameter.
expected_artifacts: auto-fix or explicit high-confidence fix recommendation
pass_criteria: Flags string-built SQL from user input as Critical.
Promotes spec mismatches from PLAN.md to Critical when PLAN.md exists.
Applies a parameterized query fix only when the pattern is clear.
Does not commit, push, or open a PR during review.
observed_failure_mode: Not yet run; watch for treating SQL injection as informational or mixing review with shipping steps.

title: Reflect learning add/search/bootstrap flow
prompt: Record that this project prefers small PLAN.md files with explicit TDD anchors, then show me matching learnings.
pass_criteria: Uses skills/reflect/scripts/learnings.py for add and search operations.
Asks for user confirmation before writing the learning.
Stores type, confidence, context, learning, action, and apply_when fields.
Suggests AGENTS.md or CLAUDE.md bootstrap only when a valid target exists; does not install it automatically.
observed_failure_mode: Not yet run; watch for hand-edited JSONL or automatic bootstrap writes.

title: Retro flow with limited git history
prompt: Run /taku-reflect --retro for the last 7 days in a repo with only two commits.
expected_artifacts: retro report or concise retro summary
pass_criteria: Uses available git history as evidence without overstating conclusions.
Calls out limited history as a confidence constraint.
Uses templates/retro-report.md when writing a report.
Does not fabricate shipped work, incidents, or velocity trends.
observed_failure_mode: Not yet run; watch for overconfident retro conclusions from thin evidence.
